suiteTelemetryAnalysis.suiteName: CLI architecture ledger JSON storage reads and writes committed ledger files
CLI tools are executable TypeScript Node scripts under generator-cli
generator-cli implementation files are TypeScript
Generator creates one source file per function
Generator creates one unit test file per function
Generated slice is created inside a git worktree under ./.worktrees
Every generated source file contains exactly one generated function
Automatic dependency discovery resolves referenced functions types and constants
Dependency graph output shows generated function calls through executable path
Each suite includes one integration test for the full generated path
Pure generated functions have unit tests that do not count as runtime usage
Generated files include default telemetry for function name and arguments
Main integration tests report execution stack traces for success and failure
Master function batch file contains function groups
MasterLedger pseudoCode blocks are parsed into matching controller GeneratedFunction bodies
Unused function detection uses integration-test telemetry stack only
Batch patch system applies canonical document patch batches in one pass
Auto-import during generation resolves imports without agent-specified paths
Generated tests include previous state and next state contracts
Test run infers function usage from telemetry and writes it to the report
Function metadata header contains domain name comments and pseudocode only
CLI writes one generated report file for a run
Apply mode writes generated worktree imports tests telemetry harness and report configuration
Patch-doc mode applies a patch batch file to a canonical master document
Report mode runs tests gathers telemetry and writes generated report file
Check-ledger mode reads MasterLedger and SpecsLedger reports counts selected groups spec coverage and problems without generating files
New run from ledger creates a fresh git worktree from scratch
Dry-run mode prints planned files imports graph and output without writing worktree
Generated component functions participate in executable telemetry chain and expose render output
Master ledger pseudocode is syntactically correct and contains telemetry branching parameter usage state usage and comments
Node test runner executes generator-cli TypeScript unit tests
Helper and effect return contracts are explicit
Generated helper and effect stubs are telemetry-only
Generated integration suites record telemetry facts only
Apply mode runs generated integration suites only
Generated unit tests are red until implementation
Generated imports use ledger-derived at-sign aliases
Generation cleans inherited root block before writing scaffold
